overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a bustling waterfront market during a hazy golden hour sunset. The character navigates past neon-lit stalls and dense crowds of NPCs before sitting on a ledge overlooking a desolate wasteland.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered food stall at waterfront edge

events.description: moves from under the circular canopy into the open walkway along the water

agents.ego_description: walking past a circular food stall canopy and along the waterfront promenade

notable_agents.action: vendor standing by the food stall under the canopy

entered.detail: large circular metal umbrella structure covering a food vendor stall
green metal safety railing along the waterfront edge
tall industrial structures with neon signs and metal walkways

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a large circular canopy at a waterfront food stall during a hazy orange sunset. The character walks forward along the concrete promenade, passing the vendor and moving from the sheltered area into the open walkway with the railing visible on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved waterfront walkway with overhead structures

events.description: view opens to reveal corrugated metal shacks on stilts over the water
path curves right along the waterfront, railing remains on right side

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved waterfront path passing various pedestrians and market carts

notable_agents.action: vendor pushing a cart with goods along the walkway

entered.detail: dilapidated metal shacks built on stilts over the water
elevated pedestrian bridge crossing above the street
large vertical digital billboard with colorful advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the curved waterfront walkway where the path bends to the right. Corrugated metal shacks become visible in the distance over the water, while an overhead pedestrian bridge spans the left side. The crowd density increases as the character passes vendors with carts.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense cyberpunk market street with neon signage and graffiti

events.description: camera passes close to pedestrians temporarily blocking the view
exiting the dense market area into the open waterfront overlook

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense crowds of cyberpunk pedestrians and past various market stalls

notable_agents.action: woman with white hair and pink jacket standing by a vending machine
group of pedestrians in colorful cyberpunk attire walking toward the camera

entered.detail: glowing red neon arrow sign pointing left mounted on a pole
brightly lit automated vending machines with colorful displays
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
red paper lanterns hanging overhead across the street

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a densely crowded section of the market street, with neon signs and graffiti-covered walls lining the path. The waterfront railing shifts to the left side as the path curves. Various cyberpunk pedestrians fill the walkway, including a distinctive woman with white hair near the vending machines.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront overlook with wasteland view

events.description: character stops walking and sits down on the concrete ledge
camera focuses on the expansive sunset view over the desolate wasteland

agents.ego_description: sitting down on the concrete ledge to look out over the wasteland and sunset

notable_agents.action: person sitting alone on the distant ledge overlooking the water

entered.detail: desolate muddy ground with sparse vegetation stretching to the horizon
large metal drainage pipes lying on the ground near the ledge
tall advertising structure visible in the distance against the orange sky

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dense market into an open waterfront overlook. The view opens up to reveal a vast desolate wasteland bathed in golden hour light. The character walks to the edge and sits down on the concrete ledge, with large corrugated pipes nearby, to gaze at the expansive sunset over the industrial landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling, neon-lit waterfront market that eventually opens into a vast, desolate industrial wasteland. It begins under a large circular canopy at a food stall, moving forward along a concrete promenade as the character leaves the shelter for an open walkway under a hazy orange sunset. As the path bends to the right, the scene expands to reveal corrugated metal shacks over the water and an overhead pedestrian bridge, with the crowd density increasing around various vendor carts. The camera then pushes through a densely packed market street lined with graffiti and neon signs, passing diverse pedestrians and a white-haired woman before the waterfront railing shifts to the left. Finally, the character emerges from the crowded corridor into an open overlook, walking to the edge of a concrete ledge beside large pipes to sit and gaze at the expansive golden hour light over the distant wasteland.
